rationale: Fix-up diff adds 'items-center' to the ProfileCard flex container, resolving the vertical misalignment between the text-xs paragraph and the min-h-[24px] button. No prior blocking findings to re-verify (final round had 0 patch/decision_needed findings; HITL request-changes was a visual UX correction). No new high-risk issues introduced: single Tailwind class addition with no behavioral, security, or API implications. Fix-up commit format valid.

business_review.criterion: Interactive hit area ≥24×24 CSS px (WCAG 2.2 SC 2.5.8)
business_review.evidence: min-w-[24px] min-h-[24px] retained; items-center addition does not affect target size

business_review.criterion: Reliable accessible name — aria-label required (title alone insufficient)
Visible focus outline for keyboard operability
business_review.evidence: focus-visible ring classes unchanged by fix-up

business_review.criterion: Scope: Profile page (ProfileCard.tsx) primary; NavigationProfile.tsx bonus

standards_review.standard: Commit message format: EPMCDME-XXXX: Capital sentence
standards_review.notes: Fix-up commit 'EPMCDME-8233: Fix vertical alignment of copy icon with user ID text in ProfileCard' complies

standards_review.standard: Security: no credentials or secrets introduced
